Name: Eastman Brushless Rotary Hammer 500W Lithium Battery 22mm chuck 1400RPM No Load Speed 4700BPM impact Energy Comfort Grip Free Socket Drilling
Description: The Eastman Cordless Impact Wrench is a powerful tool designed for demanding tasks, boasting a robust 350W motor. It offers variable speeds with three no-load options at 3000, 2250, and 1800 RPM, ensuring versatility for various applications. The wrench also features high impact energy levels of 3700, 2800, and 2250 IPM, making it capable of handling tough jobs. Delivering 280 N.m. of torque, this tool is perfect for heavy-duty fastening needs. Its 1/2" (12.7mm) drive ensures compatibility with standard sockets, making it highly versatile. The set includes everything you need: one cordless impact wrench, one battery, one charger, and additional accessories. Its cordless design provides the flexibility to move freely around your workspace, while the ergonomic design ensures comfort during use. Brushless Motor: Enhanced efficiency and longer tool life with no maintenance required. Built with durable construction, this impact wrench is ideal for automotive, construction, and DIY projects,
